name: wb-country
_note: Fetches a country profile (region/income/capital/lat-lon) from the World Bank. Fuzz_cases land on the PRE-NETWORK ISO-3 validation branch (absent + malformed), so NO outbound call is made and the result is deterministic. The V2 XSS probe on 'country' also fails the ISO-3 regex pre-network. NEVER no_db (no DB).
